description: Open and link the cross-repo PR group for a polyrepo track, then let the merge train land it

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "land"` and the requested `trackId` as structured JSON.

Use the returned topology, polyrepo preflight, review gate, fleet status, branch-set entries, provider actions, git actions, and any review_bundle target/review paths. Land publishes only affected repo track branches plus required control-plane publication state.
When the packet reports `phase_state: "ready"` or `"pending_provider"`, call the packet again with `execute: true` only after required review and provider evidence are available.
If the packet returns `phase_state: "pending_provider"`, execute only the returned provider MCP actions and write evidence back through Cadre packets.

Summarize every repo result, linked review artifact, CI state, publication ledger path, control commit, git-note push state, packet warnings, changed canonical JSON artifacts, generated human projections, and remaining blockers.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
